SQLLite.SQL: SELECT J.JUDGMENT_TYPE AS "Type" ,NVL(J.JOINT_JUDGMENT,'N') AS "JointJudgment" ,J.TOTAL AS "Total" ,J.INSTALMENT_AMOUNT AS "InstalmentAmount" ,J.INSTALMENT_PERIOD AS "Frequency" ,J.FIRST_PAYMENT_DATE AS "FirstPaymentDate" ,J.JUDGMENT_DATE AS "JudgmentDate" ,NVL(J.MCOL_JUDG_REF, 'CJ' || TO_CHAR(J.JUDG_SEQ)) AS "JudgmentReference" ,J.DATE_OF_FINAL_PAYMENT As "PaidInFullDate" FROM JUDGMENTS J WHERE J.JUDG_SEQ = ${param.judgSeq}
